name: Howard Sims
abstract: Howard "Sandman" Sims (January 24, 1917 – May 20, 2003) was an African-American tap dancer who began his career in vaudeville. He was skilled in a style of dancing that he performed in a wooden sandbox of his own construction, and acquired his nickname from the sand he sprinkled to alter and amplify the sound of his dance steps.

concerts.label: Kool-Newport Jazz Festival: There I Go, There I Go, There I Go - We Remember Eddie Jefferson
